title: Summer Contracts for Grant-Supported Faculty & Staff — Interactive Module
content: Articulate Rise interactive training module on Summer Contracts for Grant-Supported Faculty and Staff at Morgan State University. Created by Ryan Mobley (CRA) and originally delivered as a D-RED seminar on 2024-04-10. Self-paced — walks through summer contract policies, eligibility, rate calculations, and the routing workflow. Companion Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/lI4o9UmvRA3QjzFXUJuWFNU5Pd8GdYj6G7jsFj2Z97Wv2s7Pc51vqFarGU6atSu1.5Q2_odFD6aCH-kbt
